title: MVS Proposal
description: A structured proposal from an AI Agent. This is the single entrypoint for all agent-driven actions, which can be either direct filesystem commands (for Implementers) or logical plan updates (for Planners). The 'commands' and 'spf_plan_update' properties are mutually exclusive.

plan_analysis.description: A mandatory strategic review of the project plan, assessing validity, soundness, and opportunity.

summary.description: A brief, human-readable summary of the proposed changes.

event_type.description: The conventional commit type for the event (e.g., 'feat', 'fix', 'chore').

commands.description: For Implementer Agents: An ordered list of direct file system operations to be executed. This is mutually exclusive with 'spf_plan_update'.

spf_plan_update.description: For Planner Agents: A declarative, logical update to the project plan knowledge graph. This is mutually exclusive with 'commands'. The harness will route this to the SPF compiler for validation and command generation.

completed_task_path.description: Optional: The path to the task file that is completed by this proposal. CRITICAL: If no task is being completed, this key MUST be omitted from the proposal object entirely. DO NOT include it with a null or empty string value.

context_request.description: Optional: A formal request for additional context files required to complete a task. This is typically used when aborting a task due to missing information.
